summary: Applied the private Windmill runtime live on docker-runtime-lv3, provisioned its PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, published it through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy, and verified workspace bootstrap and job execution end to end.

verification.observed: make converge-windmill completed successfully from the main integration worktree after aligning the workspace and seed-script API handling with Windmill's live behavior.
curl returned CE v1.662.0-3-g911df958e7 from http://100.118.189.95:8005/api/version.
curl to /api/users/whoami returned superadmin_secret@windmill.dev with super_admin=true through the Proxmox host Tailscale proxy.
POST to /api/w/lv3/jobs/run_wait_result/p/f%2Flv3%2Fwindmill_healthcheck returned the expected probe value, workspace lv3, and job_id_present=true.

notes: The live rollout had to account for Windmill API quirks: workspace existence returns a JSON boolean, the script create endpoint stores the path without an extension, and script execution resolves that stored path directly.

One initial healthcheck script version was created manually through the Windmill API during rollout debugging to confirm the path semantics; the final converge from main now resubmits the same repo-managed definition idempotently.
